MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-27-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Apr-19-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-07-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:

Dale Allen, Esq. on behalf of cross-complainant GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE, HIGHWAY & TRANSPORTATION
David Hirshik, Esq. on behalf of cross-defendant JEFFREY VAN BICKLE

Matter settled after being sent to Judge Pro Tem. Terms of the settlement are as follows:
Cross-defendant Jeffrey Van Bickle to pay cross-complainant Golden Gate Bridge, Highway & Transportation the sum of $500.00. Each side to bear their own costs.

This matter had already been set the CRC 225 calendar for April 19, 2005 in Dept. 212. No need to set another.

Judge Robert L. Dondero, Clerks: V. Mu/D. Hakewill Reporter: Noreen Ikeuye, #3538 (206)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Chaitin, Reptr: K. Kollehner, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, Dept #220 - c/c for mand settlement conference; case settles; terms and conditions place on the record as follow: judgment for pltf in the amount of $32,930.10 from defendants Golden Gate Bridge District upon approval from District board; pltf releases all claims; pltf to take care of all medical liens; pltf to file dism w/prej once approval of settlement has been granted; the 2/7/05 trial date remains as to Johansen pltf and Van Bickel defendant.
